title: DENT BOIS
description: Modpack for the DENT BOIS Community Server
body: This modpack offers the **ultimate** vanilla Minecraft experience with a twist of **optimized performance, seamless quality-of-life improvements**, and **subtle visual enhancements**. Built for the **DENT BOIS Community**, it focuses on **preserving the core essence of the game** while making it **smoother, more intuitive, and visually engaging**. Whether you're exploring vast terrains, managing your inventory, or collaborating on ambitious builds, this modpack ensures a **lag-free and polished adventure**. Perfect for those who love vanilla Minecraft but crave a few modern conveniences to take their gameplay to the next level!
